violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment * that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Ice machine has black bacterial growth on the inside cabinet
General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Poly cutting board has deep cuts and scratches that are unable to be cleaned.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. - Air return on the vent system has an accumulation of dust.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Fans in the kitchen are not being cleaned adequately. Fans have an accumulation of dust on them, blowing dust around the food prep area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors and walls dirty. - Floor in need of repair.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
